subcodes.first_line: O ye family of them that are assured of God! Give thanks that ye were awakened by the divine call and freed from vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانواده موقنین بالله شکر کنید که از ندای حق بیدار شدید و از وساوس بیزار از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
